title: vriesea goniorachis
intro: Vriesea goniorachis is a species of flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae, commonly known as tillandsia. This epiphytic plant is native to Brazil and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vriesea goniorachis include its potential to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and prevent infections, as well as its ability to exhibit anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Vriesea goniorachis can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used in the treatment of various health conditions.
